narrative_text: A boy with curly hair helps his grandmother in a warm kitchen. She wears a green apron. They place fresh cookies on a red wagon to bring to the neighbors. The small brown dog watches from under the table.
scene_description: A sun-drenched, cozy kitchen serves as the backdrop where a boy and his grandmother prepare a delivery. The color palette is dominated by warm yellows, earthy terracotta, and the striking red of a wagon. The composition focuses on the interaction between the characters in the foreground as they load treats.

properties.distinctive_features: silver hair tied in a neat bun and a warm smile

title: The Baking
